post.description: Retrains the dance style classification model using user-confirmed and high-confidence tracks. Optionally reclassifies all tracks afterward.

post.summary: Resume task dispatching for a queue (or all queues)
Queue DONE tracks for re-analysis
post.description: Sets DONE tracks to REANALYZING and dispatches audio analysis. Tracks remain visible in search results while being re-analyzed.

post.summary: Queue tracks for audio analysis by status
post.description: Dispatches up to 'limit' tracks with the given status to the audio worker. Supports PENDING (default) and FAILED. FAILED tracks are reset to PENDING before dispatch.

post.summary: Pause task dispatching for a queue (or all queues)
post.description: Sets a pause flag and purges pending messages. Workers finish current work but receive nothing new.

post.summary: Cleanup tracks stuck in PROCESSING status
